---
title: "Lucy Yonge"
---

## Lucy Yonge

**Dates:** (1819-1902)

**Maiden name:** (Acland)

### Description

cousin-in-law of CMY, wife of [[person:1611]George Edward Yonge]

### Letters

- Letter from Feb 4th  [1901]
- Letter from Novr 24th [1899]
- Letter from Sept 17th [1897]
- Letter from October 10, 1891[[footnote:1]]
- Letter from Aug 18th [1889?]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
